chapter_title.ar: بَابُ أَنَّ الصَّلَاةَ وَ الطَّوَافَ أَيُّهُمَا أَفْضَلُ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 126 – The Prayer and the Tawaaf, which of the two is superior

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (18/31)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (18/31)
text: طَوَافٌ قَبْلَ الْحَجِّ أَفْضَلُ مِنْ سَبْعِينَ طَوَافٍ بَعْدَ الْحَجِّ .

en.hubeali: A number of our companions, from Sahl Bin Ziyad, from Ibn Fazzal, from Ibn Al Qaddah,
(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullahasws having said: ‘The Tawaaf before the Hajj is superior than seventy Tawaafs after the Hajj’.
en.sarwar: 3. A number of our people have narrated from Sahl ibn Ziyad from ibn Faddal from ibn al-Qaddah who has said the following: “Abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, has said that performing Tawaf before al-Hajj is more excellent than seventy Tawaf after al-Hajj.”
